caption: A man with a tall, spiked silver wig and glasses sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a black professional microphone. The background features a wall adorned with several framed photographs and a shelving unit with clothing and a "LEE" brand sign. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left reading "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right reading "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression, while the camera angle remains constant. The scene is static with minimal movement, capturing the man in a mid-shot as he appears to be listening or preparing to speak during a recording session.
